name: gitguardian-agent-skills
description: Official GitGuardian skills for AI coding agents — secret scanning powered by ggshield

plugins.name: ggshield
plugins.description: Catch hardcoded secrets in your code with ggshield, GitGuardian's open-source secret scanner. Detects 700+ secret types in files, git history, Docker images, and PyPI packages — and walks you through removal and rotation.
